top.title: Iran targets headquarters of Iranian Kurdish forces in Iraq
top.summary: The Iranian military's strikes come amid speculation that the US wants Iranian Kurdish groups to join its conflict with Iran.

top.title: US asked Ukraine for help fighting Iranian drones, Zelensky says
top.summary: Ukraine's president says Kyiv will only help if doing so does not deplete its own air defences.

top.title: Britney Spears arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence
top.summary: The singer was arrested by the California Highway Patrol at around 21:30 PT (05:30 GMT) on Wednesday.

top.title: Musk tells jury 'people read too much' into his posts
top.summary: The billionaire is accused of misleading investors in the run-up to his 2022 Twitter purchase.

top.title: Father claims Google's AI product fuelled son's delusional spiral
top.summary: The case is the first wrongful death case against Google over alleged harms caused by Gemini.

top.title: Regulator contacts Meta over workers watching intimate AI glasses videos
top.summary: Videos, including of glasses-wearers using the toilet or having sex, are sometimes reviewed by a Kenya-based subcontractor.
